form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 5th over 400m at Geelong beaten 11 lengths (23.30) behind Sketchy Demos in a Grade 5 H on April 7. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 1, scoring two times. Go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 5th over 400m at Geelong beaten 11 lengths (23.30) behind Sketchy Demos in a Grade 5 H on April 7. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 1, scoring two times. Go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Faltered approaching first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.96) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 10 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting six victories and four places from 20 starts. Has ability and should be around the money.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on second turn and approaching home turn.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 400m at Geelong. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Chill Out Plate at Horsham last start over 410m (23.95). Gets back so might need a bit of luck.

form.formComment: Lines up chasing another win after scoring over 300m at Healesville in 17.18, set up by a fast early sectional. Well-performed from this draw. Key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when second (23.24) over 400m at Warragul. Tough draw to overcome and will need to find best.
